hidden_metadata_tags.[ASE_GRAVITY_PULL]: Increases sub-bass intensity and slow down tempo-feel
hidden_metadata_tags.[ASE_SPECTRAL_GHOST]: Adds high-freq reverse-reverb tails and fractal whispers
hidden_metadata_tags.[ASE_VOID_INIT]: Removes all harmonic pads, leaves only Kick + Noise + Sub
hidden_metadata_tags.[ASE_HYPER_DETAIL]: Forces 1/64 note micro-glitches and ultra-fast arps
hidden_metadata_tags.[ASE_ANALOG_WARMTH]: Adds subtle pitch-drift (±5 cents) and tape-saturation emulation

legacy.usage: Invisible to user, used by ASE to maintain Narrative Fidelity.
